scenario.name: chatbot
scenario.justification: 32 concurrent users with balanced I/O (512/512) stress-tests vLLM's PagedAttention scheduler. This reveals whether the system can maintain acceptable latency under production load, or if VRAM fragmentation causes request queuing and tail-latency spikes.

sensitivity.network: MODERATE — Amortized across batch, but still per-token
sensitivity.nvlink: MODERATE — Batched AllReduce is more efficient
sensitivity.vram: CRITICAL — 32 concurrent sequences compete for KV-cache pages

ttft.description: Time To First Token — measures prefill + scheduling latency

tpot.description: Time Per Output Token — steady-state decode speed

analysis.decode_bottleneck: COMPUTE/MEMORY-BOUND. GPU hardware is the primary bottleneck (healthy state).
